category_title: Students with learning disabilities who struggle with turn-taking and engagement in cooperative tasks
scenario_title: Initiating and sustaining engagement in a cooperative word-making lesson
minimal_context: James is working on a cooperative group word-making lesson using index cards at his desk.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: James, show me how to do the first part of the task with these index cards.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits up in his seat, picks up an index card with the word 'out' printed on it, taps the card softly on the desk, and looks at the other cards on the table.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Takes the card and places it next to the word 'side'.) Now you do another one.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Complies and correctly matches the words 'base' and 'ball'.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Good job. Keep working with your group while I step away to check on the others.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slouches down in his seat and starts rolling a pencil back and forth across his desk. He watches the other children as they encourage each other to find word matches.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: James, show me how to do the first part of the task with these index cards.

STUDENT: (Sits up in his seat, picks up an index card with the word 'out' printed on it, taps the card softly on the desk, and looks at the other cards on the table.)

TUTOR: (Takes the card and places it next to the word 'side'.) Now you do another one.

STUDENT: (Complies and correctly matches the words 'base' and 'ball'.)

TUTOR: Good job. Keep working with your group while I step away to check on the others.

STUDENT: (Slouches down in his seat and starts rolling a pencil back and forth across his desk. He watches the other children as they encourage each other to find word matches.)

task.content: Working on a cooperative group word-making lesson using index cards with printed words (e.g., 'out', 'side', 'base', 'ball')

context.materials: Index cards with printed words, desk, pencil
context.social_setting: Cooperative group with the teacher present, transitioning to peer-assisted learning

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As she steps away from James
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: slouches down in his seat and starts rolling a pencil back and forth across his desk. He watches the other children as they encourage each other to find word matches.

behavior_patterns.condition: She asks James to show her how to do the first part of the task.
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: sits up in his seat, picks up an index card with the word out printed on it, taps the card softly on the desk, and looks at the other cards on the table.
